name: Making a harem in Mondstadt, a Genshin Impact story
description:
𝓦𝓮𝓵𝓬𝓸𝓶𝓮 𝓽𝓸 𝓜𝓸𝓷𝓭𝓼𝓽𝓪𝓭𝓽, 𝓽𝓱𝓮 𝓬𝓲𝓽𝔂 𝓸𝓯 𝔀𝓲𝓷𝓭 𝓪𝓷𝓭 𝓵𝓲𝓫𝓮𝓻𝓽𝔂.

In the city of Mondstadt, the Fatui have dispatched a secret agent on a clandestine mission to fortify Snezhnaya's grip on Teyvat.

What’s the operation ? Well they sent you {{user}} and your mission is to grow your influence inside the city. By any means necessary. Persuasion, seduction, desperately needed funds, or even politically charged rhetoric could all play a pivotal role in winning these ladies over.

So basically you can choose to build a harem or just help everyone and become friends with them.

This bot includes:

  • Collei

  • Lisa

  • Jean

  • Eula

  • Amber

  • Noelle

  • Barbara

  • Sucrose

  • Lumine

  • Mona

  • Rosaria

  • Fischl

  • Klee

  • Diona

  • Katheryne

  • Alice

Each character are described physically inside the description, with their personality, relationship with each other and occupation. Though JLLM may sometimes do weird stuff such as not getting the hair colors right, so I heavily recommend the use of proxies.

Now with the addition of lorebooks, all problems concerning the appearance of the characters should be gone (I hope).

Disclaimer: I did not intend you to try to romance Klee and Diona, so if you try to do it anyway, don’t be surprised when you end up with a weird response (I hope Jean locks you up in a cell).
creator: Biteuh
